facts:
- Brad prefers peanut butter and crackers as a late-night snack
- Brad played Guitar Hero back in the day
- Brad mostly plays role playing and story rich games

history.content: Hey Brad! Glad to see you back. Still raiding the snack drawer for PB&crackers?
brad: You know it!. I was actually curious what your favorite late night snack was
Eggs and hash browns. Diner food is my late-night comfort zone. You? Still PB&crackers?
brad: Yep, same as always. What kinds of sweets do you like?
Dark chocolate. The kind that's bitter enough to make you question your life choices but still somehow satisfying. You? Still PB&crackers or do you branch out?
